title: Hadoop MapReduce Cluster Architecture
description: Hadoop MapReduce cluster architecture comprises a coordinator (JobTracker) and worker nodes (TaskTrackers). The JobTracker manages job scheduling, task assignment, and monitoring, while TaskTrackers execute Map and Reduce tasks. Data is split into InputSplits using the Strategy pattern, facilitating parallel processing. Technologies include Java for programming, and Hadoop's InputFormat for data partitioning. The architecture ensures scalability through distributed processing, maintainability via modular design, and reliability through fault tolerance. Security is maintained through access control and encryption. Performance is optimized via data locality and efficient task scheduling. The architecture demonstrates a clear coordinator-worker pattern, with InputSplit as a utility component.

TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Cluster Architecture

DESCRIPTION: Hadoop MapReduce cluster architecture comprises a coordinator (JobTracker) and worker nodes (TaskTrackers). The JobTracker manages job scheduling, task assignment, and monitoring, while TaskTrackers execute Map and Reduce tasks. Data is split into InputSplits using the Strategy pattern, facilitating parallel processing. Technologies include Java for programming, and Hadoop's InputFormat for data partitioning. The architecture ensures scalability through distributed processing, maintainability via modular design, and reliability through fault tolerance. Security is maintained through access control and encryption. Performance is optimized via data locality and efficient task scheduling. The architecture demonstrates a clear coordinator-worker pattern, with InputSplit as a utility component.
